findings.description: The source H2 section「排他制御の実現方法」contains two distinct H3 subheadings —「排他制御用テーブル」and「悲観的ロックと楽観的ロックの動作イメージ」— and is well over 2000 characters of plain text, yet the knowledge file merges both into a single section (s4) without splitting. Per V3 rules, an H2 section with ≥2000 chars and existing H3 subheadings should be split into separate knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: RST H3 headings under「排他制御の実現方法」: (1)「排他制御用テーブル」covering table design, version column definition, SQL example, and notes on separate exclusive-control tables; (2)「悲観的ロックと楽観的ロックの動作イメージ」covering operational behavior of both lock types with multiple diagram images. These two topics are distinct enough to warrant separate sections.
